name: New York-Florida Rye
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread maker to white bread mode.
2. Add yeast, rye flour, gluten flour, bread flour, buttermilk powder, sugar, salt, honey, butter, and caraway seeds into the machine.
3. Pour in water.
4. Set the dough cycle for 1 ½ lbs (scale down as needed).
5. Let the machine do its work; it will knead, proof, and bake the bread.
6. Once finished, let the bread cool before slicing and serving.
